name: parse_python_file
clone_repository
source_code:
def clone_repository(repo_url: str) -> str:
    """
    Clone a GitHub repository into a temporary directory.

    Returns:
        Local path of cloned repository.
    """

    temp_dir = tempfile.mkdtemp()

    Repo.clone_from(repo_url, temp_dir)

    print(f"Repository cloned successfully.")
    print(f"Location: {temp_dir}")

    return temp_dir

name: scan_python_files
main
source_code:
def main():

    repo = input("Enter GitHub Repository URL:\n")

    repo_path = clone_repository(repo)

    files = scan_python_files(repo_path)

    print(f"\nFound {len(files)} Python files.\n")

    for file in files:
        parse_python_file(file)
